task: Put the wooden spoon with holes on the countertop
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A kitchen countertop with a stove, a black pot, a silver kettle, a black container, and a small brown container. A wooden spoon with holes is inside the black container. The goal is to move the wooden spoon to the countertop. The spoon is inside a container, so it must be removed first. The container is on the countertop, so the spoon can be placed directly on the countertop after removal. **STRATEGY -** First, reach for and grasp the black container holding the spoon. Then, lift the container (with the spoon inside) and transport it to the countertop. Finally, place the container on the countertop, which will also place the spoon on the countertop. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach for the black container (affordance: the body of the container). Step 2: Grasp the container (affordance: the body of the container). Step 3: Transport the container to the countertop (affordance: an empty area on the countertop). Step 4: Place the container on the countertop (affordance: an empty area on the countertop).

Goal: on(wooden_spoon, countertop)
Scene: wooden_spoon, black_container, countertop, stove, pot, kettle, black_container, brown_container
Step 1: reach(black_container)
  affordance_region: the body of the black container
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_container, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_container) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_container)
  affordance_region: the body of the black container
  contact: holding(black_container) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_container)
Step 3: transport(black_container -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
  spatial: above(black_container, countertop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_container)
  done_when: above(black_container, countertop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_container -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
  contact: surface_contact(black_container, countertop) [completion]; released(black_container) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_container) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_container, countertop) AND released(black_container)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the black container
the body of the black container
an empty area on the countertop
an empty area on the countertop
